name: superslow
description: Superslow gives your agent superpowers: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: TDD, debugging, and verification utilities for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Superslow to supercharge your coding agent with rigorous test-driven development (TDD), systematic scientific debugging, strict verification loops, isolated git worktrees, and clean branch-finishing hygiene.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
